title: Ruehssia bourgaeana
taxonomy: Ruehssia bourgaeana is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Ranunculaceae. This family includes buttercups and other related species. As a member of the Ranunculaceae family, Ruehssia bourgaeana is an herbaceous perennial plant. The classification of Ruehssia bourgaeana is further categorized under the genus Ruehssia. Within the kingdom Plantae, Ruehssia bourgaeana is a part of the broader classification.
